[binaries]
c = 'x86_64-elf-gcc'
cpp = 'x86_64-elf-g++'
ar = 'x86_64-elf-ar'
strip = 'x86_64-elf-strip'

[host_machine]
system = 'baremetal'
cpu_family = 'x86_64'
cpu = 'x86_64'
endian = 'little'

[properties]
c_args = [ '-mcmodel=kernel', '-mno-red-zone', '-ffreestanding', '-mno-mmx', '-mno-sse', '-mno-sse2' ]
cpp_args =  [ '-mcmodel=kernel', '-mno-red-zone', '-ffreestanding', '-mno-mmx', '-mno-sse', '-mno-sse2' ]
